summary: Comprehensive testing of 8 Care page features for iteration 231. Backend APIs for Pawrent Journey (GET progress + POST complete-step) all pass. All 8 frontend features verified: PawrentFirstStepsTab collapsed by default (✅), expand on click (✅), GuidedCarePaths modal with grey/blur backdrop (✅), modal covers nav (zIndex 9999 > nav zIndex 50) (✅), Services tab shows CareConciergeSection with no Rs.0 prices (✅), tab bar is centered (justifyContent:center) (✅), Soul Made strip opens SoulMadeModal (✅). Sonner toaster is configured and in HTML. Toast fires after both API calls complete (slight network delay ~3-5s).

integration_issues.issue: Toast fires only after two sequential API calls (bookViaConciergeDirect + complete-step). With network latency (~3-5s round trip), the toast appears after a noticeable delay. NOT a bug - expected behavior. Sonner is properly configured (data-sonner confirmed in HTML). Toast duration=4000ms is correct.

issues: CareConciergeSection renders 'Care, Personally' header correctly. Service card content may require scroll to see all cards (not a bug - working as designed). No Rs.0 prices confirmed.

critical_code_review_comments: PawrentFirstStepsTab: isExpanded state at line 340 starts false (collapsed) - CORRECT
PawrentFirstStepsTab: chevron ▼ rotates to ▲ on expand via CSS transform rotate(180deg) - CORRECT
PawrentFirstStepsTab: Shows first step title (steps[completedCount]?.title) in collapsed header - CORRECT
GuidedCarePaths ModalShell: zIndex:9999, background:rgba(40,40,40,0.50), backdropFilter:blur(2px) - ALL CONFIRMED
CareMobilePage Services tab: line 215-219 only renders CareConciergeSection - CORRECT, no price grid
Tab bar: ios-tab-bar class with justifyContent:center - CONFIRMED centered
Soul Made strip: outer div onClick={() => setSoulMadeOpen(true)} - CONFIRMED works
Backend pawrent-journey endpoints: both registered via pawrent_journey_router on lines 24686/24727 - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Test steps 'TEST_care-first-vet', 'TEST_care-microchip-231', 'TEST_streak-check' added to pawrent_journey_progress via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Care page features from iteration 231 pass. PawrentFirstStepsTab: collapsed by default, expands on click, chevron animates, 4 steps visible for Mojo (GROWING mode, created 2026-02-26). GuidedCarePaths modal: rgba(40,40,40,0.5) backdrop + blur(2px) + zIndex:9999. Services tab: CareConciergeSection with 'Care, Personally' header (no Rs.0 prices). Tab bar: flex + justifyContent:center. Soul Made: opens SoulMadeModal. Backend: GET /api/pawrent-journey/progress/{pet_id} returns {completed_steps:[], streak_days:0}. POST /api/pawrent-journey/complete-step returns {ok:true, streak_days:N}.

passing_tests.pawrent_tab_expand: PASS - clicking header expands to show steps (2 Book buttons, First vet visit visible)
passing_tests.pawrent_tab_first_step_in_header: PASS - collapsed header shows 'First vet visit' as current step title
passing_tests.guided_care_paths_modal: PASS - modal opens with rgba(40,40,40,0.5) grey backdrop + blur(2px)
passing_tests.modal_z_index_9999: PASS - modal zIndex:9999 > nav zIndex:50 (covers entire screen)
passing_tests.services_tab_concierge: PASS - Services tab shows CareConciergeSection ('Care, Personally'), hasRs0:false
passing_tests.soul_made_strip: PASS - 'Explore Soul Made →' button opens SoulMadeModal (Made for Mojo.)
